signals.headline: NJ-11 Special Election Candidate Joe Hathaway Positions as Sole GOP Contender** | **NO** | **MED** confidence[2]
signals.raw:
NJ-11 Special Election Candidate Joe Hathaway Positions as Sole GOP Contender** | **NO** | **MED** confidence[2].

Randolph Mayor Joe Hathaway campaigns as the only Republican in the April 16 special election to replace Gov.-elect Mikie Sherrill (D), emphasizing affordability and a "big-tent" GOP without confirmed Trump endorsement[2]. Analysts note Democratic infighting in a 12-candidate primary,

South Korea Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026, Below Forecasts Amid Iran Conflict Volatility | YES | MED confidence** [1]
